untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'yearly low' reference (52-week low) and 'measure rule: divide height by 6' for price targets, neither of which are available in the allowed indicator set. 'Yearly low' would require a lookback window not supported by available indicators. The measure rule calculation requires custom logic beyond standard indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Approximated entry conditions: (1) price near yearly low using Donchian lower band as proxy for recent low; (2) tall candles approximated as range > ATR; (3) tall upper shadows as upper_wick > body. Exit conditions use reversal signal (close below SMA_20) as placeholder for unmeasurable target calculation. Volume trend noted but not translatable to specific condition. Success rates and throwback percentages are AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be translated.
